## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Verification

Describe the checks performed and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the approved project scope.
- [ ] Public content is in English.
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, or private infrastructure details are included.
- [ ] Documentation and links affected by the change are consistent.
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by` trailer.
- [ ] Relevant verification is reported above.
